response: I am a dedicated and organized professional with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, specializing in various specialties including orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, and more. I am a team leader with excellent interpersonal skills and a strong drive to learn and grow. I have experience working with leading healthcare organizations and have a proven track record of meeting high standards of accuracy and efficiency. I am reliable, adaptable, and enthusiastic about taking on new challenges. My skills include proficiency in Word, Excel, and email, with a typing speed of 70-80 words per minute. I am passionate about healthcare and committed to contributing to the success of any organization I join.
